name: caseware-cwi-experimental
description: Unified MCP gateway for Caseware Cloud: authoring, engagement management, workflow, analytics, SE API, and offline CWP template analysis.
long_description:
## Caseware CWI Experimental

A unified MCP extension providing 89 tools across 7 categories for working with Caseware Cloud and CaseWare Working Papers.

### Tool Categories
- **Authoring** — author checklists, queries, and letters directly to Caseware Cloud via MCP proxy
- **Engagement** — create, lock, unlock, rollforward engagements; manage users, roles, and templates
- **Workflow** — manage attachments, document signing/publishing, events, milestones, and audit history
- **Analytics** — browse catalog, trigger analytics, monitor status, download results and notebooks
- **SE API** — file upload/download, suggestions, risk assessments, tags
- **Knowledge Graph** — track workflows, entities, and relationships
- **Payload Builder** — validated JSON payload construction with response type detection
- **CWP Template Reader** — offline .cwp and .cvw template analysis (no CaseWare installation needed)

### Supported Document Types
- Checklists (groups, headings, procedures, conclusions)
- Queries (question sets with response columns)
- Letters (dynamic content with formula support)
- CWP template packages (.cwp files) and standalone CaseView templates (.cvw files)

prompts.name: initialize-authoring-tools
prompts.description: Full overview of Caseware CWI Experimental and suggested first steps
prompts.text: Show the full overview of Caseware CWI Experimental — available tools, supported formats, reference guides, and how to get started.

prompts.name: reference-hierarchy-rules
prompts.description: Depth marker system ([D0]-[D4], [R], [C], [G]) and validation rules
prompts.text: Load the hierarchy rules reference for depth markers and checklist validation.

prompts.name: reference-checklist-authoring
prompts.description: Checklist payload structure, response type detection, and chunking
prompts.text: Load the checklist authoring reference for payload structure and chunking strategy.

prompts.name: reference-query-authoring
prompts.description: Query payload structure with question sets and response columns
prompts.text: Load the query authoring reference for payload structure and templating.

prompts.name: reference-letter-authoring
prompts.description: Letter structure, two-step creation, dynamic elements
prompts.text: Load the letter authoring reference for structure and dynamic element detection.

prompts.name: reference-knowledge-graph
prompts.description: Knowledge Graph entity naming, relation types, and CLI usage
prompts.text: Load the knowledge graph reference for entity naming and CLI usage.

prompts.name: reference-caseware-cloud-mcp
prompts.description: Complete Caseware Cloud MCP API reference
prompts.text: Load the Caseware Cloud MCP server reference for tools, schemas, and activation.

prompts.name: reference-document-type-detection
prompts.description: Weighted scoring algorithm for document type classification
prompts.text: Load the document type detection reference for classifying documents as checklist, query, or letter.

prompts.name: reference-payload-schemas
prompts.description: Consolidated JSON payload schemas for checklist, query, and letter MCP submissions
prompts.text: Load the payload schemas reference for checklist, query, and letter JSON structures.

prompts.name: workflow-convert
prompts.description: Read and analyse source documents — text extraction, structure analysis, and procedure outline
prompts.text: Load the document reading and analysis workflow for extracting content and producing procedure outlines.

prompts.name: workflow-author
prompts.description: Author documents to Caseware Cloud — evaluator-optimizer loop, chunking, and reporting
prompts.text: Load the authoring workflow for submitting documents to Caseware Cloud.

prompts.name: workflow-full
prompts.description: Full end-to-end authoring workflow — read, analyse, author, and report
prompts.text: Load the full end-to-end authoring workflow from reading through to Caseware Cloud submission.

prompts.name: workflow-identify-type
prompts.description: Document type identification — decision tree and weighted scoring for checklist/query/letter routing
prompts.text: Load the document type identification workflow for classifying and routing documents.

prompts.name: reference-outline-format
prompts.description: Procedure outline schema for build_payload tool — checklist, query, letter formats
prompts.text: Load the procedure outline format reference for building payloads with the build_payload tool.

prompts.name: workflow-visualize
prompts.description: Visualize Knowledge Graph workflows as Mermaid flowcharts
prompts.text: Load the visualization workflow for generating Mermaid diagrams from Knowledge Graph data.

kg_path.title: Knowledge Graph Database Location
kg_path.description: Directory for the Knowledge Graph SQLite database. Leave blank for default.

engagement_url.title: Caseware Cloud Engagement URL
engagement_url.description: MCP endpoint URL (e.g., https://us.cwcloudpartner.com/.../api/v1.16.0/mcp). Required for Cloud proxy tools.

bearer_token.title: Bearer Token (Legacy)
bearer_token.description: Static bearer token for Cloud proxy. Prefer client credentials below.

caseware_host.title: Caseware Host
caseware_host.description: Caseware Cloud domain (e.g., https://us.cwcloudpartner.com). Required for engagement, workflow, analytics, and SE tools.

caseware_client_id.title: Client ID
caseware_client_id.description: OAuth2 client ID for API authentication.

caseware_client_secret.title: Client Secret
caseware_client_secret.description: OAuth2 client secret for API authentication.
